title: Trump says ships carrying oil are moving out of Strait of Hormuz

snapshot.title: Trump says ships carrying oil are moving out of Strait of Hormuz
snapshot.description: TOKYO/COPENHAGEN/WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump said ‌in ‌a ​social ‌media ⁠post ​on ⁠Monday that ⁠many ‌ships ‌loaded with ​oil ‌are starting ‌to move ‌out of the ⁠Strait ⁠of Hormuz. Trump’s latest comments come as shippers in Asia and Europe said ​confidence in resuming transit through the Strait of Hormuz could take weeks to rebuild and navigation will only restart
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Trump says ships carrying oil are moving out of Strait of Hormuz | Arab News
